info.title: Mujeza API
info.description: API documentation for Mujeza products and related endpoints.

get.description: Returns all products in one response.
Searches products using product title or description (partial match).

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Product name to search for (optional if search is provided)

get.summary: Search recommended products by disease name
get.description: Returns available products that are recommended for a given disease. The search is partial and case-insensitive — sending "سكر" will match "مرض السكري" etc.

parameters.name: disease
parameters.description: Disease name to search for (partial match)

get.description: Returns all branches in one response.
Returns complaints list with optional text search in title, description, or phone.

post.description: Creates a new order. The items field must be a single text value describing requested products.

delivery_address.example: الكويت - حولي - شارع بيروت - قطعة 4 - منزل 12

items.example: عسل سدر 2 عبوة + عسل كشميري 1 عبوة

get.description: Returns latest order status and all matching orders by order_number, customer_name, or phone. When searching by phone, cancelled ("ملغي") and delivered ("تم التسليم") orders are excluded by default — pass include_closed=1 to include them.

parameters.name: include_closed
parameters.description: Set to 1 to include cancelled and delivered orders (only applies to phone search)

get.summary: Get active orders by phone number
get.description: Returns all orders for the given phone number, excluding cancelled ("ملغي") and delivered ("تم التسليم") orders.
Returns Positive Prompt and Negative Prompt saved in system settings.

positive_prompt.example: كن ودودًا وركز على احتياج العميل

get.description: Returns all active frequently asked questions ordered by sort_order.

get.summary: Get all active FAQs as a single text block
get.description: Returns all active FAQs combined into one text string — questions and answers concatenated together, useful for AI agents and prompts.

data.example:
س: ما هي فوائد عسل السدر؟
ج: عسل السدر غني بالمعادن والفيتامينات ويُقوّي جهاز المناعة.

س: هل يمكن تناوله يومياً؟
ج: نعم، ملعقة كبيرة صباحاً على الريق.

get.summary: التحقق من تسجيل عميل بالهاتف أو remoteJid
get.description: يتحقق إذا كان العميل مسجلاً بـ phone أو remote_jid. يجب إرسال أحدهما على الأقل. إذا كان مسجلاً تُرجع بياناته مسطّحة، وإلا يُرجع registered: false.

يبحث عن العميل بالـ remote_jid. إذا وُجد يُرجع بياناته (found: true). إذا لم يُوجد يُسجّله تلقائياً مستخدماً remote_jid كـ phone وكـ remote_jid معاً، ثم يُرجع بياناته (found: false, newly_created: true). مناسب لتسجيل العملاء عند أول رسالة واتساب.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: اسم العميل (اختياري — يُستخدم فقط عند الإنشاء)

found.description: true لو كان موجوداً مسبقاً، false لو تم إنشاؤه الآن

get.description: Returns all customers. Supports optional search by name, phone, address, or remoteJid.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query (optional) — searches name, phone, address, remote_jid

post.description: The phone number is the primary key and cannot be changed after creation.

422.description: Validation error — phone already exists or missing required fields

get.summary: Get a single customer by phone number

put.description: The phone number cannot be changed. Name, address, and remoteJid can be updated.

get.summary: Get chats numbers with auto-reply state
get.description: Returns chats list (number/name) and whether auto-reply is allowed per chat, plus global toggle state.

get.summary: Get auto-reply status for single chat/phone
get.description: Checks whether auto-reply is allowed for a specific chat_id or phone, considering global + override values.

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: WhatsApp chat JID (optional if phone is provided)

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: Phone number in local or international format (optional if chat_id is provided)

post.summary: Enable or disable auto-reply for specific chat
